description: Deal Detail Action Buttons — Wire 14 No-Ops. (1) EntityHeader 6 no-ops all with onClick: () => {} (F-08): Won → moveStage CLOSED_WON with success dialog; Lost → moveStage CLOSED_LOST with LossReasonModal (reuse from list page); Edit → navigate to edit form or open inline edit; Clone → duplicate mutation; Archive → set archived status; Delete → AlertDialog confirmation + delete mutation. (2) Stakeholder/Product/File 8 no-ops (F-09): Edit stakeholders → open edit dialog; Account icons → navigate to /accounts/[id] and website; Contact icons → mailto: and tel: links; Add Product → product association dialog; File upload → upload mutation; File links → presigned URL download. Depends on IFC-278 (real data needed for mutations). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 2.

wiring_complete.target: 14/14 buttons functional; confirmation dialogs for destructive actions
wiring_complete.actual: 9 genuine no-ops (audit stale, pre-IFC-278): 5 wired to existing procedures (Won/Lost/Delete/Edit/Stakeholders), 4 deferred to honest 'Coming soon' toasts + Rule-8 tracking (no backing procedure: Clone/Archive/AddProduct/Upload).

test_coverage.actual: 92 web + 75 application tests green; page.tsx coverage-excluded (no diff-coverage burden); covered changed files unit-tested.

validations.name: Tests
validations.command: pnpm --dir apps/web exec vitest run deals/[id]+LossReasonModal+DealForm+(list) (92); @intelliflow/application OpportunityService.additional (75)

validations.name: Lint
validations.command: eslint --max-warnings 0 (6 touched web files + application changes)

validations.name: Build
validations.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web build (next build --webpack, CI env stubs); @intelliflow/application build

status_history.note: 5 buttons wired to existing procedures; 4 deferred (no backend) with Coming-soon toasts + Rule-8 tracking; D-2 description-persistence fix.

notes: Deal/opportunity domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md.
